clientContracts.Extra cost: Min charge 2 cbm per drop point.  - Drop point:  + HN: 80,000vnd/drop point for 1-1.7ton; 150,000vnd/drop point for 5ton truck  + Province: 1 ton: 150,000vnd/drop point; 1.7 ton: 200,000vnd/drop point; 300,000vnd/drop point for 5-8ton  - Unloading fee : Super market & Lan Chi dealer unloading fee 30,000vnd/cbm  - Pororo products or heavy products convert to CBM ( 300kg = 1cbm)  - Return fee is 50% of trip  - Cut-off time: By trip is before 15:00PM D-1day; By CBM is before 12:00PM D-1day.   - Delivery Order that are released to CJ KX Vietnam after the scheduled cut off time and expected to deliver within the next morning will be considered as urgent delivery. The urgent delivery may incur additional costs, which must be informed to PALDO in advance
clientContracts.Cut off time: -Inbound: 14:00 on D-1 --Outnound: 15:00 (by trip) or 12:00 (by CBM) on D-1
